title: Demonstrate a Safe Chemical Reaction
description: Phoenix walks you through a harmless experiment that introduces basic eco-friendly propellant concepts.

dialogue.text: Phoenix here, your resident chemist. I'd like to show you how a simple reaction demonstrates eco-friendly fuel chemistry. Interested?
Carefully mix baking soda with vinegar in this open bottle. The fizzing gas is harmless but shows how fuel chemistry releases energy.
Great job! We'll build on this sustainable experiment later to design clean rocket fuel.
